zh.lifeSummary: 當Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd於1070年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利朗阿多可時，她的父親Gruffudd ap Cydrych23歲，母親Joan verch RHYS Arbenning23歲。她於大約1086年與King Bledri Ap Cydifor結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安文尼奧。

nameMeanings.name: Ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

en.lifeSummary: When Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd was born in 1070, in Llangadock, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Gruffudd ap Cydrych, was 23 and her mother, Joan verch RHYS Arbenning, was 23. She married King Bledri Ap Cydifor about 1086. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd est née en 1070, à Llangadock, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Gruffudd ap Cydrych, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan verch RHYS Arbenning, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé King Bledri Ap Cydifor environ 1086. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée à Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd 1070 in Llangadock, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffudd ap Cydrych 23 und ihre Mutter Joan verch RHYS Arbenning 23. Sie hat um 1086 King Bledri Ap Cydifor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb in Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd è nata il nel 1070 nel Llangadock, Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Gruffudd ap Cydrych, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Joan verch RHYS Arbenning, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato King Bledri Ap Cydifor circa 1086. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Clydwen Ferch Gruffuddが1070年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランゲアドックで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ap Cydrychは23歳，母Joan verch RHYS Arbenningは23歳であった。約1086年にKing Bledri Ap Cydiforと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランウィニオで死去した。

ko.Llangadog Fawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랭가도그 인 키드웰이
ko.lifeSummary: Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd(이)가 1070년 웨일스 카마테실르 랭가독에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Cydrych(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan verch RHYS Arbenning(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1086년 King Bledri Ap Cydifor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜윈이오에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd nasceu em 1070, em Llangadock, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Gruffudd ap Cydrych, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan verch RHYS Arbenning, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com King Bledri Ap Cydifor aproximadamente 1086. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.Llangadog Fawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales: ллангадог ин кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd родилась в 1070 г. в местности ллангадокк, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Cydrych было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan verch RHYS Arbenning, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Bledri Ap Cydifor около 1086 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в местности лланвинио, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clydwen Ferch Gruffudd nació en 1070, en Llangadock, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Gruffudd ap Cydrych, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Joan verch RHYS Arbenning, tenía 23 años. Se casó con King Bledri Ap Cydifor aproximadamente 1086. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
